narrative:
Chardon City has 3,963 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
